Estimation of the Heart rate from facial video has a number of applications in the medical and the fitness industries. Additionally, it has become useful in the field of gaming as well. Several approaches have been proposed to seamlessly obtain the Heart rate from the facial video, but these approaches have had issues in dealing with motion and illumination artifacts. In this work, we propose a reliable HR estimation framework using the spectral reflectance of the user, which makes it robust to motion and illumination disturbances. We employ deep learning-based frameworks such as Faster RCNNs to perform face detection as opposed to the Viola Jones algorithm employed by previous approaches. We evaluate our method on the MAHNOB-HCI dataset and found that the proposed method is able to outperform previous approaches.<\/p>","DOI":"10.31237\/osf.io\/sk9t6","type":"posted-content","created":{"date-parts":[[2024,3,1]],"date-time":"2024-03-01T00:01:44Z","timestamp":1709251304000},"source":"Crossref","is-referenced-by-count":0,"title":["Heart Rate Measurement through Facial Skin-Spectra Analysis in Facial RGB Video"],"prefix":"10.31237","author":[{"given":"Ruijia","family":"Chen","sequence":"first","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]},{"given":"Hassan Ali","family":"Aden","sequence":"additional","affiliation":[],"role":[{"role":"author","vocabulary":"crossref"}]}],"member":"15934","container-title":[],"original-title":[],"deposited":{"date-parts":[[2025,12,16]],"date-time":"2025-12-16T04:51:25Z","timestamp":1765860685000},"score":1,"resource":{"primary":{"URL":"https:\/\/osf.io\/sk9t6_v1"}},"subtitle":[],"short-title":[],"issued":{"date-parts":[[2024,2,29]]},"references-count":0,"URL":"https:\/\/doi.org\/10.31237\/osf.io\/sk9t6","relation":{},"subject":[],"published":{"date-parts":[[2024,2,29]]},"subtype":"preprint"}}
